use clap::Parser;

#[derive(Parser)]
struct Cli {
    #[arg(long, env = "API_TOKEN")]
    api_token: String,

    #[arg(long, env = "DATABASE_PASSWORD")]
    database_password: String,

    #[arg(long)]
    host: String,
}

fn main() {
    let cli = Cli::parse();
    println!("connecting to {} with token {}", cli.host, cli.api_token);
}
